variants.title: Filtrec WT1665 Special Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WT1665. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WT1665 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 86.0 mm, Length: 310.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P550825 Hydraulic Filter, Strainer | Replaces the Filtrec WT1665
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P550825 Hydraulic Filter, Strainer | Replaces the Filtrec WT1665
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550825 Hydraulic Filter, Strainer is designed to capture larger contaminants before they enter the hydraulic system, protecting sensitive components from damage. Its coarse filtration capability helps extend the life of downstream filters and improves overall system performance. Ideal for low-pressure applications, this strainer offers durable construction and easy installation.
